case_title: BAY, JAMES DBA ONE-EYED JACKES VS WELLMAN, RONALD IND/DBA A-1ELETRIC & WELLMAN ELETR et al

docket_entries.description: SURETY COMPANY OF THE PACIFIC IS NOT AN APPELLANT. IT WAS ENTERED BY MISTAKE WHEN APPEAL FILED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,704.24 FILED BY BAY, JAMES DBA ONE-EYED JACKES AS TO DEFENDANT WELLMAN, RONALD IND/DBA A-1ELETRIC & WELLMAN ELETR SURETY CO. OF THE PACIFIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WELLMAN, RONALD IND/DBA A-1ELETRIC & WELLMAN ELETR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY, JAMES DBA ONE-EYED JACKES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WELLMAN, RONALD IND/DBA A-1ELETRIC & WELLMAN ELETR SURETY CO. OF THE PACIFIC $3,704.24 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,759.24, SURETY CO. OF THE PACIFIC IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY, JAMES DBA ONE-EYED JACKES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WELLMAN, RONALD IND/DBA A-1ELETRIC & WELLMAN ELETR SURETY CO. OF THE PACIFIC JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26465 ON 1-18-01. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO KATHY GOODWIN/SURETY CO. OF THE PACIFIC---RETURNED TO SENDER UNSIGNED DUE TO REFUSED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-20-2000, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-02-2000 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY RONALD WELLMAN ONLY.
APPEAL TRANSFERRED TO APPELLATE DEPT. SCA 26465
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WELLMAN, RONALD IND/DBA A-1ELETRIC & WELLMAN ELETR SURETY CO. OF THE PACIFIC
